title: Microsoft Graph User
description: Represents a Microsoft Entra user account. Inherits from directoryObject. Contains properties for identity, contact information, organizational role, and account settings managed through Microsoft Graph API.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user (GUID). Inherited from directoryObject.

displayName.description: Name displayed in the address book, usually the combination of first name, middle initial, and last name

givenName.description: The given name (first name) of the user

mail.description: The SMTP address for the user

userPrincipalName.description: The user principal name (UPN) in internet-style login format based on RFC 822

mailNickname.description: The mail alias for the user

department.description: The name of the department in which the user works

officeLocation.description: The office location in the user's place of business

companyName.description: The company name associated with the user

mobilePhone.description: The primary cellular telephone number for the user

faxNumber.description: The fax number of the user

streetAddress.description: The street address of the user's place of business

city.description: The city where the user is located

state.description: The state or province in the user's address

postalCode.description: The postal code for the user's postal address

country.description: The country or region where the user is located

usageLocation.description: A two-letter country code (ISO 3166) required for users assigned licenses

preferredLanguage.description: The preferred language for the user in ISO 639-1 format (e.g., en-US)

accountEnabled.description: True if the account is enabled; otherwise, false

employeeId.description: The employee identifier assigned to the user by the organization

employeeType.description: Captures enterprise worker type (e.g., Employee, Contractor, Consultant, Vendor)

employeeHireDate.description: The date and time when the user was hired or will start work

ageGroup.description: Sets the age group of the user

consentProvidedForMinor.description: Whether consent was obtained for minors

legalAgeGroupClassification.description: Legal age group classification used by enterprise applications

createdDateTime.description: The date and time the user was created in ISO 8601 format and UTC

deletedDateTime.description: The date and time the user was deleted

lastPasswordChangeDateTime.description: The time when the user last changed their password

identities.description: Represents the identities that can be used to sign in to this user account

imAddresses.description: The instant message VoIP SIP addresses for the user

proxyAddresses.description: Email addresses that direct to the same mailbox

assignedLicenses.description: The licenses assigned to the user, including inherited group-based licenses

assignedPlans.description: The plans assigned to the user

onPremisesSyncEnabled.description: True if the object is synced from an on-premises directory

onPremisesDistinguishedName.description: Contains the on-premises Active Directory distinguished name

onPremisesLastSyncDateTime.description: Last time the object was synced with the on-premises directory

onPremisesSamAccountName.description: Contains the on-premises SAM account name

passwordPolicies.description: Specifies password policies for the user

mySite.description: The URL for the user's personal site

aboutMe.description: A freeform text entry field for the user to describe themselves

interests.description: A list for the user to describe their interests

birthday.description: The birthday of the user in ISO 8601 format and UTC

externalUserState.description: For a guest invited to the tenant, this represents the invitation status

creationType.description: Indicates how the user account was created

EmployeeOrgData.description: Represents organization data associated with a user

division.description: The name of the division in which the user works

costCenter.description: The cost center associated with the user

ObjectIdentity.description: Represents an identity used to sign in to a user account

signInType.description: Specifies the user sign-in type (e.g., emailAddress, userName, federated)

issuer.description: Specifies the issuer of the identity

issuerAssignedId.description: Specifies the unique identifier assigned to the user by the issuer

AssignedLicense.description: Represents a license assigned to a user

skuId.description: The unique identifier for the SKU

disabledPlans.description: A collection of the unique identifiers for disabled plans

AssignedPlan.description: Represents a plan assigned to a user

assignedDateTime.description: The date and time at which the plan was assigned

servicePlanId.description: A GUID that identifies the service plan

PasswordProfile.description: Contains the password profile associated with a user

forceChangePasswordNextSignIn.description: If true, at next sign-in the user must change their password

forceChangePasswordNextSignInWithMfa.description: If true, at next sign-in the user must perform MFA before changing their password

password.description: The password for the user. Required when creating a user.
